blockMeta.name: takt/cards-grid
blockMeta.title: Cards Grid
blockMeta.description: Responsive grid block displaying multiple cards with optional images, titles, descriptions, and tertiary buttons with arrow icons

attributes.name: darkMode
attributes.description: Enable dark mode with charcoal background

attributes.name: columns
attributes.description: Number of columns on desktop (1, 2, or 3)

attributes.name: button
attributes.default: {title: "", url: "", postId: null, opensInNewTab: false, label: ""}

existingDecisions: Two stacked sections per card (image wrapper + content wrapper)
Dark mode uses pseudo-element with charcoal background
Tertiary button with arrow via ThemeButton variation
Image hidden completely when not set

projectRules.darkModePattern: Section: 'dark bg-transparent!' + Container: 'relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1'
